validated_commands.format: python3 -m uv run black . && python3 -m uv run isort .
validated_commands.notes: uv is not on PATH in CI; use 'pip install uv --break-system-packages' then 'python3 -m uv'

coverage_baseline.notes: All 1683 tests pass after ANSI fix. Fixed 7 ANSI failures across test_unpacker.py (4), test_update_command.py (2), test_install_command.py (1). Added _strip_ansi() helpers.

yaml_pollution_note: Running tests with --cov causes PyYAML global state corruption from some earlier test. Affects parse_skill_file and parse_primitive_file calls when run in full suite with coverage. Not a new issue. Tests pass without --cov.
ansi_strip_note: Added _strip_ansi() helper (re.sub r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*m', '', text) to test_unpacker.py, test_update_command.py, and test_install_command.py. Rich Console outputs bold ANSI codes even in Click CliRunner capture.

testing_backlog.notes: Uncovered: parse_skill_file inner (33-44), unknown type branch (87-90), _parse_context description (159), _extract_primitive_name structured .agent.md (204-207, 214, 216, 218, 223)
Remaining uncovered: display/formatting paths (264-333, 436-518, 759-801) - require distributed compiler stack

completed_work.description: Fixed 7 failing tests: 4 in test_unpacker.py::TestUnpackCmdLogging, 2 in test_update_command.py::TestUpdateCommand, 1 in test_install_command.py. Added _strip_ansi() helper using re.sub to strip ANSI escape codes before plain-text assertions. 1683 tests now pass (0 failures).
Created PR for ANSI fixes, not merged. Fixed same pattern in 5 tests.
PR #254 created then closed. Added 54 unit tests for primitives/discovery.py (78%->97%) and parser.py (72%->76%).
Added 34 unit tests for agents_compiler.py (65%->82%). PR #221 still open with passing CI.
